title: Detoxification * Deafness - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Detoxification * Deafness 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Deafness Homelessness Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LIFELINE CONNECTIONS LIFELINE CONNECTIONS EAST VANCOUVER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a full-service behavioral health agency with services including medically-assisted detoxification, substance use treatment, a residential program for substance use treatment, mental health outpatient treatment, a co-occurring disorder (i.e. mental health and substance use disorder), comprehensive outpatient substance use treatment, supported housing and employment, and sober living. Specializes in treatment for those addicted to opioids and alcohol by offering medication to assist in the recovery process. The Deaf and hard of hearing substance use treatment program is one of only a handful in the country. 11719 NE 95th Street Suite A/D Vancouver, WA 98682 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Appointments: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Medication Assisted Recovery (MAR) rapid response: Monday-Friday 9am-11am Email (360) 984-5511 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFELINE CONNECTIONS LIFELINE CONNECTIONS VA CAMPUS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a full-service behavioral health agency with services including medically-assisted detoxification, substance use treatment, a residential program for substance use treatment, mental health outpatient treatment, a co-occurring disorder (i.e. mental health and substance use disorder), comprehensive outpatient substance use treatment, supported housing and employment, and sober living. Specializes in treatment for those addicted to opioids and alcohol by offering medication to assist in the recovery process. The Deaf and hard of hearing substance use treatment program is one of only a handful in the country. 1601 E Fourth Plain Boulevard Suite A212 Vancouver, WA 98663 Eligibility: Unrestricted, some outpatient programs are available for the Deaf or hard of hearing Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Detox: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Assessments: Monday-Thursday noon-3pm MAR Rapid Response: Wednesday 9am-11am Email (360) 397-8246 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
